history.reason: All 10 Done conditions empirically verified: D1 7 integrations + 6-state fields; D2/D3 /integrations+/integrations-view+/status all 200; D4 batches 23/23 + 16/16, dispatch pending=0; D5 _derive_state/_derive_blocker live, no qmd_only false positives; D6 Mirage solar-logical wording correct; D7 Symphony dry_run_sidecar + executes_builders=False; D8 OWL not_connected; D9 5 suites + 42 checks PASS; D10 final report with §7 conflicts table 8 items (4 by-design + 4 actionable). 5 falsification attempts failed. 2 low-severity warnings (cache warmup, handoff text accuracy).
